articles.title: AMD will reinstate memory encryption on Ryzen 9000 CPUs through a BIOS update in July — TSME is coming back after 'valuable community feedback'
articles.summary: AMD says it will reinstate firmware memory encryption (TSME) on non-PRO Ryzen 9000 desktop CPUs through a BIOS update in July, following the feature's removal through an earlier firmware update.
articles.title_zh: AMD 將通過 7 月 BIOS 更新在 Ryzen 9000 CPU 上恢復記憶體加密 — TSME 在「寶貴社群回饋」後回歸
articles.summary_zh: AMD 宣布將通過 7 月的 BIOS 更新在非 PRO Ryzen 9000 桌上型 CPU 上恢復韌體記憶體加密 (TSME) 功能，該功能先前已透過韌體更新移除。

articles.title: Your 15-inch daily driver is now $250 off — Dell 15 laptop with hexa-core CPU, 8GB RAM dips to $349
articles.summary: The Dell 15 laptop has just come down from its regular price of $599.99 to $349.99.

articles.summary_zh: Dell 15 筆電價格從原價 $599.99 下降至 $349.99。

articles.title: WhatsApp tests new animated message bubbles on iPhone
articles.summary: The latest WhatsApp beta available on TestFlight brings back message animations on iOS, this time with a setting that lets users turn them off. Here are the details.
articles.title_zh: WhatsApp 在 iPhone 上測試新的動畫消息氣泡
articles.summary_zh: 最新的 WhatsApp TestFlight 測試版為 iOS 帶回了消息動畫，並提供了用戶可以關閉動畫的設置。

articles.title: Bear app developers announce Lettera, a beautiful Markdown editor for Mac
articles.summary: Available now in beta, Lettera is a standalone Markdown editor app built around the same editor that powers Bear 2. Here are the details.
articles.title_zh: Bear 應用開發者宣布推出 Lettera，一款精美的 Mac Markdown 編輯器
articles.summary_zh: 現已推出測試版的 Lettera 是一款獨立的 Markdown 編輯器應用，採用了與 Bear 2 相同的編輯器引擎。

articles.title: iPhone parts factory in India faces new health probe over alleged water contamination
articles.summary: Despite iPhone parts manufacturer Tata saying recent water samples collected inside its factory in Hosur, India, showed no signs of contamination, Reuters reports that local health officials are still investigating complaints from nearby farmers. Here are the details.
articles.title_zh: 印度 iPhone 零件工廠因涉嫌水污染面臨新的健康調查
articles.summary_zh: 儘管 iPhone 零件製造商塔塔表示在印度 Hosur 工廠內採集的最近水樣沒有污染跡象，但路透社報導當地衛生官員仍在調查附近農民的投訴。

articles.title: HomeKit Weekly: The Qingping Air Monitor Lite brings a retro vibe to Apple Home climate tracking
articles.summary: One constant on my desk for a few years now has been the Qingping Air Monitor Lite. When a device can look awesome, but also provide some really cool data for your Apple Home environment, it’s going to be a must-have.
articles.title_zh: HomeKit 周刊：Qingping Air Monitor Lite 為 Apple Home 氣候追蹤帶來復古風格

articles.title: Pixelated 105: An Android 17 summer
articles.summary: Welcome to episode 105 of Pixelated, a podcast by 9to5Google . This week, Abner, Damien, and Will return to talk all through the launch of Android 17. From general improvements to Pixel-specific changes, there’s plenty to dig through. Plus, Pixel Screenshots goes cloud, Google’s new smart speaker goes up for pre-order, and it might be easier than ever to jump back and forth between Android and iOS. articles.title: T1 phone saga gets stranger as PR team abandons Trump Mobile
articles.summary: Credit: NBC News / YouTube TL;DR The PR team that was previously supporting Trump Mobile has reportedly left. It’s unclear if Trump Mobile is currently using a different PR team. The T1 phone, commonly known as the Trump phone, has had quite the tumultuous story. From vaporware concerns to a data leak affecting thousands . Most recently, a teardown confirmed that the phone was simply a gold-plated, modified version of the HTC U24 Pro. But that’s the point of a public relations firm: to give bad stories a positive spin. However, it appears the mess may have grown too big even for Trump Mobile’s PR team. According to The Verge , the Poplar Group has ceased representing Trump Mobile. The company’s founding partner, Chris Walker, has told the outlet that his team “is not assisting Trump Mobile
articles.title_zh: T1 手機傳奇變得更加奇怪，PR 團隊放棄 Trump Mobile
articles.summary_zh: 之前支持 Trump Mobile 的 PR 團隊據報已經離職，目前不清楚 Trump Mobile 是否正在使用其他 PR 團隊。

articles.title: These crucial Google services on Samsung phones may be waiting for you to update
articles.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Google has rolled out updates for Android System SafetyCore, Android System WebView, and Google Play Services on Samsung phones. The updates carry the version numbers 1.0.925574157, 149.0.7827.91, and 26.22.33. These apps don’t appear on the Manage apps & device page, so you’ll need to update them manually. When you need to update an app on your Samsung phone, you can open the Google Play Store, navigate to Manage apps & device, and hit Update or Update all. This same process works for almost every Google-made app, but there are a few exceptions. Some of those exceptions just got an update, and you’ll need to update them manually to get the new versions. Spotted by SamMobile , Google has rolled out updates for Android System SafetyCor
articles.title_zh: 三星手機上的這些關鍵 Google 服務可能在等待你更新
articles.summary_zh: Google 已為三星手機推出了 Android System SafetyCore、Android System WebView 和 Google Play Services 的更新。

articles.title: Another US state may require age verification to access social media
articles.summary: TL;DR A US appeals court has ruled Ohio can enforce a 2023 law requiring parental consent for kids under 16 to use social media. For users in Ohio, the law would effectively require age verification at sign-up for platforms like YouTube and TikTok. Proponents argue that the law will help protect children from potential online harm. Detractors note drawbacks including cybersecurity risks involved in online ID verification, as well as potential First Amendment issues. Another US state is making headway toward restricting social media access for kids. This week, a US appeals court ruled that Ohio can enforce a law requiring social media operators to obtain parental consent before allowing children under 16 to access their platforms, overturning a 2024 decision that had blocked the law from go
articles.title_zh: 另一個美國州可能要求年齡驗證才能訪問社交媒體
articles.summary_zh: 美國上訴法院裁定俄亥俄州可以執行 2023 年的法律，要求 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體時獲得父母同意。

articles.title: This new Google TV projector from ETOE can light up your wall and charge your phone
articles.summary: Credit: ETOE TL;DR ETOE has announced it is launching the Dolphin 2 in the US and select European markets. This projector offers certified Google TV, a 54Wh built-in battery, 800 lumens, and native 1080p resolution with 4K decoding. Pre-orders are open, with early bird pricing ending on June 28. Projectors come in all shapes and sizes, especially the ones that are designed to be portable. If you’re on the hunt for something you can plop down anywhere, ETOE (Eazy to Enjoy) has a new offering. The company is launching the second generation of its Dolphin projector. Today, ETOE announced the pre-sale launch of the Dolphin 2. While the original Dolphin projector was a fairly compact, cylindrical device, the Dolphin 2 adopts a larger, rectangular form. Just by looking at it, you wouldn’t be abl
articles.title_zh: ETOE 推出新款 Google TV 投影儀，可照亮牆面並為手機充電
articles.summary_zh: ETOE 宣布將在美國和部分歐洲市場推出 Dolphin 2 投影儀，配備 Google TV、54Wh 電池、800 流明和原生 1080p 解析度。

articles.title: Android 17 appears to have broken 5G for some Pixel owners
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Android 17’s stable rollout is causing headaches for some Pixel users, with reports of 5G connectivity disappearing after the update. The bug appears to affect multiple Pixel models, including the Pixel 9 Pro series, Pixel 8 Pro, Pixel 8a, and Pixel 6a. Some users are also seeing additional issues, including missing eSIMs and Wi-Fi networks that no longer reconnect automatically. Just as the highly anticipated Android 17 stable update is finally rolling out to the Pixel lineup , the shiny new software is leaving a trail of connectivity dead zones in its wake. Owners are reporting that installing the new operating system is completely knocking out their 5G access. If you’ve recently updated your phone and noticed a sudden disappearance of fast do
articles.title_zh: Android 17 似乎破壞了某些 Pixel 用戶的 5G
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 的穩定版推送對某些 Pixel 用戶造成問題，許多用戶在更新後遇到 5G 連接消失的情況。

articles.title: Our favorite early Prime Day 2026 deals and the best of the rest we’ve found so far!
articles.summary: Prime Day isn’t officially here just yet, but some of the deals are already looking worthy of the main event. Amazon has started rolling out early discounts on smart home gear, wearables, tablets, headphones, and more, with plenty of products already dropping to prices we’d usually expect during the sale itself. The tricky part, as always, is sorting the genuinely good offers from the noise. We’re here to help, having combed through Amazon’s early Prime Day deals to pick out the standout discounts. We’ll run you through a few of our top highlights below, and you can head further down for a broader roundup of the best early deals on all manner of tech. Just remember that many of the best offers will require an Amazon Prime membership. The good news is that new subscribers can usually sign u
articles.title_zh: 我們最喜歡的 2026 年 Prime Day 早期優惠和迄今為止最佳優惠！
articles.summary_zh: Prime Day 還未正式開始，但一些優惠已經值得參加主活動，Amazon 已開始對智能家居設備、可穿戴設備、平板電腦和耳機等進行早期折扣。

articles.title: Android 17 is messing up some Pixel phones’ touch input
articles.summary: TL;DR Pixel users on Android 17 are reporting touchscreen issues. Multiple Pixel generations are exhibiting similar problems, suggesting this isn’t device-specific. Google has acknowledged the issue, but hasn’t committed to a fix. Android 17 recently started making its way to Pixel phones, and as per usual, wider distribution is revealing new bugs. For example: a number of Pixel say that since installing the latest update, they’ve been experiencing touch screen issues, including erratic scrolling. A couple of Reddit threads are full of users who say their Pixels’ touch screens are acting up since installing Android 17. It seems like issues can present in a couple of different ways, and multiple Pixel generations are affected.
articles.title_zh: Android 17 導致某些 Pixel 手機的觸摸輸入出現問題
articles.summary_zh: 執行 Android 17 的 Pixel 用戶報告觸摸屏問題，多個 Pixel 世代都出現類似問題，Google 已承認該問題但未承諾修復。

articles.title: Here's when Infinix is launching the Note 60 Pro 5G Pininfarina Limited Edition in India
articles.summary: Infinix's Note 60 Ultra is designed by famed Italian design house Pininfarina, and it's been available since last month. Infinix also launched the Note 60 Pro, and brought it to India in April. Now, the brand has a surprise for the Indian market. Coming on June 24 at 12 PM local time on Flipkart is the Infinix Note 60 Pro 5G Pininfarina Limited Edition, in that Torino Black color we've also seen on the Note 60 Ultra. There doesn't seem to be any other difference between this one and the regular Note 60 Pro 5G aside from the color, which comes with a "carbon fiber finish design" and...
articles.title_zh: Infinix 將在印度推出 Note 60 Pro 5G Pininfarina 限量版的時間
articles.summary_zh: Infinix 的 Note 60 Ultra 由著名意大利設計公司 Pininfarina 設計，自上月起已上市，Infinix 還推出了 Note 60 Pro。

articles.title: OnePlus 15s isn't happening, tipster claims
articles.summary: In April of last year, OnePlus launched the 13T in China. Then, in June, it released basically the same phone in India as the OnePlus 13s. Back in March of this year, the company introduced the 15T in China, so you're probably expecting it to launch in India as the 15s very soon. OnePlus 15T However, according to a tipster over on X, that is not going to happen. The device will not be coming to India at all, for whatever reason. Furthermore, whether the upcoming OnePlus 16 will launch in India still hasn't been decided. We'd be surprised if the 16 skips India, but the 15s apparently...
articles.title_zh: OnePlus 15s 不會推出，爆料者稱
articles.summary_zh: 去年 4 月，OnePlus 在中國推出了 13T，隨後在 6 月以基本相同的手機在印度推出了 OnePlus 13s。

articles.title: Ultrahuman launches M2 Live metabolic health platform for continuous glucose monitoring
articles.summary: Ultrahuman is best-known for its smart rings, but the company recently branched out with a red light therapy device. Today, the company is introducing the Ultrahuman M2 Live, a platform for continuous glucose monitoring. This is actually based on the Lingo Glucose Biosensor by Abbott. It’s available over-the-counter and does not require a prescription. M2 can also work with Abbott’s Libre 3 Plus sensor. The Lingo sensor streams data to your phone over Bluetooth LE, though you will need NFC to activate it. Continuous glucose monitoring • Metabolic Score It’s important to note...
articles.title_zh: Ultrahuman 推出 M2 Live 代謝健康平台以進行連續血糖監測
articles.summary_zh: Ultrahuman 以其智能戒指而聞名，但該公司最近推出了紅光治療設備，現在推出 Ultrahuman M2 Live 連續血糖監測平台。

articles.title: Here's why Apple is already dropping support for so many watches in watchOS 27
articles.summary: At its Worldwide Developers Conference earlier this month, Apple unveiled watchOS 27. This will be rolling out in the fall. Perhaps surprisingly, watchOS 27 will drop support for a lot of older Apple Watches, including the original Apple Watch Ultra, released in 2022. That device was the first Apple Watch to cost a whopping $799, so many owners may still be using it. But come September, they will only receive essential security updates, as the watch is not getting watchOS 27. Asked why, Apple Watch and Health Product Marketing Manager Cait Dooley told TechRadar: With every software...
articles.title_zh: Apple 為何已經在 watchOS 27 中放棄了對多款手錶的支持
articles.summary_zh: 在本月早前的全球開發者大會上，Apple 推出了 watchOS 27，該版本將在秋季推出並放棄對包括 2022 年發布的原版 Apple Watch Ultra 在內的許多舊款 Apple Watch 的支持。

articles.title: Global Oppo Reno16 series finally has an official launch date
articles.summary: Yesterday, Oppo started teasing the global launch of the Reno16 series in partnership with the K-pop girl band BABYMONSTER. The phones were clearly supposed to be launching soon, but an actual announcement date was missing. Now, the company has rectified that, revealing that the Reno16 series will be unveiled on June 25. The devices will first launch in Thailand and Spain, spreading to other markets afterwards. The handsets feature the new "3D Pop Planet Design", with "a bold and distinctive aesthetic inspired by cosmic visuals and the idea of every individual as a vibrant little...
articles.title_zh: 全球 Oppo Reno16 系列終於有了官方發布日期
articles.summary_zh: 昨天，Oppo 開始預告與 K-pop 女團 BABYMONSTER 合作的 Reno16 系列全球發布，現在公司已公布發布日期。

It makes some sense - the Nothing Phone (3) hasn't done very well, so the company might be...

articles.title: From PGP to Mythos: a brief history of export controls that didn’t stop anyone
articles.summary: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.
articles.title_zh: 從 PGP 到 Mythos：無法阻止任何人的出口管制簡史
articles.summary_zh: 過去30年來，試圖阻止網路安全相關軟體流動已證明無效，目前仍不清楚為何對 Anthropic 的網路安全模型 Mythos 會有不同結果。

articles.title: Taara beams fiber-class data through the air to keep AI buildouts moving
articles.summary: Taara Beam swaps mechanical mirrors for a fingernail-sized photonic chip In sum – what we know: Fiber gets all the credit, and for good reason. It’s the backbone of global connectivity, it’s high-capacity, and it’s proven. But it’s also slow…
articles.title_zh: Taara 透過空氣傳輸光纖等級數據以推動 AI 基礎設施建設
articles.summary_zh: Taara Beam 用指甲大小的光子晶片取代機械鏡子，提供高容量光無線通信解決方案，以加快 AI 基礎設施部署速度。

articles.title: Complexity, convergence, AI and the demand for trust are reshaping telecom testing
articles.summary: In sum, what to know: –Telecom testing is shifting from point-in-time verification to continuous validation. As networks become increasingly cloud-native, multi-technology and automated, operators are moving toward continuous, end-to-end testing that combines active and passive elements and real-world performance monitoring.…
articles.title_zh: 複雜性、融合、AI 和信任需求正在重塑電信測試
articles.summary_zh: 電信測試正從點對點驗證轉變為持續驗證，運營商採用端到端測試方法，結合主動和被動元素以應對日益複雜的雲原生多技術網絡環境。

articles.title: “Time to clean up human slop”: Why AI now reviews code better than your teammate.
articles.summary: As AI models now take over the core processes of writing code, the conversation has shifted to how effectively we can use AI itself to review the codebases currently being created. If the consensus here suggests we should move the human checkpoint upstream, the question of just exactly where human developers should be working now comes to the fore.  It’s a pain point that surfaces in teams where a mandatory peer review now risks serving mostly as a rubber stamp. A pull request sits in a peer review channel for a couple of days before another developer, who arguably has very little context for what the software engineer did in the first place, finally becomes available… only to say, “Let’s gamble. Try merging.” “We must realize that it’s time
articles.title_zh: 「是時候清理人類垃圾代碼了」：為什麼AI現在比你的隊友更善於代碼審查
articles.summary_zh: 隨著AI模型接管代碼編寫的核心流程，談話焦點已轉向如何有效利用AI本身來審查現有代碼庫。若共識認為應將人類檢查點上移，關鍵問題在於確定人類介入的確切位置。

articles.title: Iran War Gives Pakistan Its Biggest Diplomatic Boost in Decades
articles.summary: Throughout the nearly four-month Iran war, few countries were more visibly at the center of the efforts to end it than Pakistan, an unlikely actor thrust into the spotlight by US President Donald Trump.
articles.title_zh: 伊朗戰爭為巴基斯坦帶來數十年來最大的外交助力
articles.summary_zh: 在近四個月的伊朗戰爭期間，巴基斯坦成為終止衝突努力中最引人矚目的國家之一，被美國總統川普推向聚光燈下。

articles.title: Trump Tells Axios He Doesn’t See Anthropic as US Security Threat
articles.summary: President Donald Trump said he doesn’t view Anthropic PBC as a national-security threat, days after his administration took steps to cut off foreign access to the tech company’s most advanced artificial intelligence models.
articles.title_zh: 川普告訴 Axios 他不認為 Anthropic 構成美國安全威脅
articles.summary_zh: 美國總統川普表示，他不認為 Anthropic PBC 構成國家安全威脅，此言論在政府採取措施限制外國使用該公司最先進人工智能模型後數天發表。

articles.title: Nobel Winner John Jumper to Leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
articles.summary: Google DeepMind Vice President John Jumper, who won the 2024 Nobel Prize in chemistry for his work on artificial intelligence, is leaving the company to join Anthropic PBC.
articles.title_zh: 諾貝爾獎得主 John Jumper 將離開 Google DeepMind 加入 Anthropic
articles.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 副總裁 John Jumper 因在人工智能領域的工作獲得 2024 年諾貝爾化學獎，現將離職加入 Anthropic PBC。

articles.title: Node.js揭露與修補12個漏洞，當中涵蓋兩個高風險漏洞
articles.summary: 開放原始碼JavaScript執行環境Node.js這幾天發布安全性更新公告，揭露與修補12個漏洞（CVSS評分尚未公布），其中兩個為高風險漏洞，6個為中風險漏洞，4個為低風險漏洞，Node.js 22、Node.js 24、Node.js 26均受到影響，目前開發團隊已釋出修補漏洞的更新版本——Node.js 22.23.0、Node.js 24.17.0、Node.js 26.3.1。

articles.title: Unlucky PC builder sent RTX 5070 from Amazon, gets DVD rewriter and a busted logic board from an early 2000's Kenwood AV receiver instead — $700 GPU turns out to be e-waste thanks to return scam
articles.summary: Another person has fallen victim to Amazon's generous return policy, as they received a disc drive, a mousepad, and an AV receiver instead of the $700 RTX 5070 they ordered.
articles.title_zh: 衰運 PC 組裝者從 Amazon 訂購 RTX 5070，收到 DVD 重刻機和損壞的老款 Kenwood AV 接收器邏輯板 — $700 顯卡因退貨詐騙成為電子廢物
articles.summary_zh: 又有人成為 Amazon 寬鬆退貨政策的受害者，原本訂購的 $700 RTX 5070 卻收到光碟機、滑鼠墊和 AV 接收器。

articles.summary_zh: 安全研究員為智慧燈泡增添新功能，偷偷將其改造成充滿「禁書」的「朋克數位死信箱」。

articles.title: Apple is permanently closing three stores today, here’s the list
articles.summary: Apple is permanently closing three stores in the United States later today. The company first announced the closures in April, impacting locations in Connecticut, Maryland, and California. Here’s the full list.
articles.title_zh: Apple 今日永久關閉三家門市，完整名單在此
articles.summary_zh: Apple 今日永久關閉美國三家門市，此決定於四月首次宣布，涉及康州、馬州及加州的門市。

articles.title: Love NotebookLM but hate giving Google your data? I found a great open-source alternative
articles.summary: Credit: Shimul Sood / Android Authority I personally love NotebookLM, though it’s far from the only tool I’ve used for summarizing information or extracting research data. It is arguably the very best, though, as pretty much every alternative is closer to a supplement than a true replacement. That said, there is one that gets very close. Open Notebook is virtually a clone of NotebookLLM’s core functionality, including stand-out features like audio summaries, the ability to ask questions about your research sources, and so much more. Of course, nothing is perfect, and it isn’t without catches. Below, I’ll dive into what I love about Open Notebook, what is less ideal about it, and how to give it a try for yourself.
articles.title_zh: 喜愛 NotebookLM 但不想將資料交給 Google？我找到了絕佳的開源替代方案
articles.summary_zh: NotebookLM 是資訊摘要和研究資料提取的最佳工具，但若擔心隱私問題，市場上存在開源替代方案可供選擇。

articles.title: As an Android expert, here are 5 popular apps I don’t recommend downloading
articles.summary: Those download numbers you see on the Play Store app listings are a terrible way to judge if an app is worth installing. I’ve seen it with popular VPNs, antivirus apps, caller ID services, and even password managers . Of course, I’m not saying every popular app is bad. Far from it. But there are plenty of apps I’d recommend most people avoid, either because of privacy and security concerns or because they try to solve problems that Android already handles perfectly well on its own.
articles.title_zh: 身為 Android 專家，以下是我不建議下載的 5 個熱門應用程式
articles.summary_zh: Play Store 上的下載量並非判斷應用程式是否值得安裝的可靠指標，許多熱門應用如 VPN、防毒軟體和密碼管理器往往並不如預期。

articles.title: I tried Samsung Health’s huge redesign for 2026. Here are the 5 biggest hits and misses
articles.summary: I’ve used Garmin Connect, Fitbit, Google Health, and Xiaomi’s various health tracking apps in the past, but I’ve always felt most at home with Samsung Health. The base of operations for the company’s Galaxy Watch and fitness tracker bouquet has seen few massive UI changes over the years, but this week, the company rolled out a sparkly new app ahead of the Galaxy Watch 9 debut and One UI 9 rollout. And boy, is it different. Although my initial snapshot impression was one filled with disgust and disappointment, after using the app for several hours, I can confirm that my feelings are more complicated than that. There’s good and bad here, and I’ve experienced both.
articles.title_zh: 我試用了 Samsung Health 2026 年的大幅改版，以下是 5 個最大的成功和失敗之處
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Health 迎來多年來最重大的使用者介面改版，作者對此新設計進行了詳細評測。

articles.title: I spent a month with the Onn 4K Pro (2026), and now the Google TV Streamer seems pointless
articles.summary: It’s 2026, and you’re in the market for a Google TV streaming device. What’s a person to get? You might assume that your best option is the Google TV Streamer — and you wouldn’t be wrong to assume so. The Google TV Streamer is arguably the most popular Google TV box on the market today, and it’s a darn good one, too . But is it the one you should buy? A month ago, I would have said yes without thinking twice. However, after living with Walmart’s new Onn 4K Pro, I’m not so sure.
articles.title_zh: 我花了一個月測試 Onn 4K Pro（2026），現在 Google TV Streamer 似乎沒有必要
articles.summary_zh: Onn 4K Pro 2026 提供強大的功能和價值，使得 Google TV Streamer 相形之下顯得不那麼有吸引力。

articles.title: Google Assistant ruined my smart home setup — but Gemini just saved it
articles.summary: A year ago, the inconsistency of the Google Home ecosystem had me seriously considering leaving the platform altogether. Google Assistant and Siri were equally as unreliable, and the advent of Matter interoperability meant I wasn’t tied down to a single smart home ecosystem anymore. The switch from Google Assistant to Gemini for Google Home gave me a glimmer of hope that I might be able to keep my Nest Hub and Nest Hub Max displays as primary smart home controllers. I’ve been using Gemini as my Google Home assistant since last October, and it made my Nest devices functional again — some as old as a decade. I’m thrilled with how my Home Hub (2018), Nest Hub Max (2019), and Nest Battery Doorbell (2021) work together with Gemini as their conductor.
articles.title_zh: Google Assistant 毀了我的智慧家居設置——但 Gemini 剛拯救了它
articles.summary_zh: Google Home 生態系統的不穩定性曾讓用戶考慮棄用，但新的 Gemini 技術成功改善了此問題。

articles.title: Samsung still hasn’t fixed Exynos overheating issues, and it’s ruining my Galaxy S26
articles.summary: Whether you’re a Samsung fan or an impartial Android observer, we can all agree that Samsung’s Exynos chipsets have had a rocky few years. The Galaxy S23 skipped Exynos entirely due to inconsistent performance, overheating, and poor efficiency, while the Galaxy S25 also sidelined it — likely influenced by Qualcomm’s major leap with the Snapdragon 8 Elite, alongside reported low yields from Samsung’s 3nm process. The Exynos 2500 eventually surfaced in last year’s Z Flip 7 , but that wasn’t a mainstream showing. But now that we have the Galaxy S26 series , complete with Exynos 2600 , Samsung thinks its custom processor is ready to compete with the best in the business once more.
articles.title_zh: Samsung 仍未修復 Exynos 過熱問題，它正在毀掉我的 Galaxy S26
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Exynos 晶片組近年來一直存在過熱和效能問題，影響了 Galaxy S26 的使用體驗。

articles.title: Early Prime Day deals: Galaxy S26 Ultra, S25 Ultra, Poco F8 Ultra and X8 Pro Max price cuts
articles.summary: Prime Day is next week – it will run from June 23 to the 26th. However, Amazon Germany has already started offering early Prime Day deals. You need a subscription for these, but the free trial will work just fine. There is a mix of old and new models below, though, usually, the newer model makes more sense. Also, more often than not, the upgrade to the higher storage tier is quite cheap and well worth taking. We’ll start with the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra and S25 Ultra – check out our in-depth comparison if you need help deciding between these two. In short, the 2026 Ultra brings Privacy...

articles.title: RugOne Xlink 7 hands-on review
articles.summary: We love the outdoors, and what better time to get back to hiking? Naturally, we can’t go without some tech and RugOne, part of the Ulefone family, sent us their Xlink 7. Well, they actually sent us two of them, and we got to test them out as intended. So, what is the Xlink 7 anyway? Well, it’s a walkie-talkie. But not the type you may have played around with as a kid. This is an “AI 4G communicator” with “unlimited range” as RugOne puts it. A modern-day walkie-talkie complete with a rugged and waterproof build, unlimited 4G connectivity, and as “mandatory” for any device in 2026 -...
articles.title_zh: RugOne Xlink 7 動手評測
articles.summary_zh: RugOne Xlink 7 是 Ulefone 家族推出的戶外科技產品，提供出色的登山和戶外體驗。

articles.title: Redmi Turbo 5 is now on sale in India
articles.summary: The Redmi Turbo 5, launched in India earlier this week, is now on sale through Xiaomi's Indian website, Amazon.in, and Xiaomi Retail stores across the country. The Redmi Turbo 5 comes in Turbo White, Nitro Blue, and Asphalt Black colors in India with two memory options - 8GB/256GB and 12GB/256GB, priced at INR37,999 and INR40,999, respectively. Redmi Turbo 5's color options The Redmi Turbo 5 is powered by the Dimensity 8500 Ultra SoC, runs Android 16-based HyperOS 3, and packs a 6.59" 120Hz 1,268p AMOLED display. The Turbo 5 features three cameras - a 50MP primary, an 8MP...

articles.title: OnePlus N6's charging speed officially confirmed, chipset revealed by Geekbench
articles.summary: OnePlus will unveil the OnePlus N6 on June 30 as the first smartphone in its new N Series. The brand already showed us the N6 in two colors and confirmed that it will pack an 8,000 mAh battery. Now, OnePlus has confirmed how fast the smartphone will charge. In a post on X, OnePlus India revealed that the N6 will support 45W SuperVOOC charging, enabling 1.7 hours of video playback with a 5-minute charge. The video shared by OnePlus also suggests the N6 will support reverse wired charging, but it's unclear how fast the smartphone will charge other devices. You’ll spend more time choosing...
articles.title_zh: OnePlus N6 充電速度官方確認，Geekbench 洩露晶片組訊息
articles.summary_zh: OnePlus 將於 6 月 30 日發表新 N Series 首款手機 OnePlus N6，官方已確認其 8,000 mAh 電池的充電速度。

articles.title: Backporting bug fixes is dead, Project Valkey now  sends in the bots
articles.summary: When Project Valkey released version 9.1 last month, users, contributors and maintainers alike were understandably excited: There were new functionalities and improvements spanning security, observability, performance, and efficiency.  What not everyone knew was that 9.1 had a whole batch of bug fixes performed by an AI agent. For the uninitiated, Valkey is an open source, high-performance, in-memory data store . With a home at the Linux Foundation , the Redis alternative supports caching, message broker queues, and complex key-value data structures. A stack of bug fixes needed cherry-picking Madelyn Olson , Valkey project maintainer and principal engineer for AWS in-memory databases , tells The New Stack that as the team geared up for the Valkey 9.1 release , their release branch was
articles.title_zh: Backporting 錯誤修復已過時，Project Valkey 現在派出機器人
articles.summary_zh: Project Valkey 上月發佈版本 9.1 時，用戶、貢獻者和維護者都感到振奮，因為新增功能涵蓋安全性、可觀測性、效能和效率改進。但並非所有人都知道 9.1 包含了整批錯誤修復。

articles.title: Losing Fable made the best case yet for AI models you can run yourself
articles.summary: The most-said line in one of my group chats this week was three words, on repeat: “I miss Fable.” I do too. It was fresh and fun and felt like the next generation. Yet three days after its launch, a U.S. government letter took it offline. The lesson is bigger than Fable: Access is not ownership. A hosted model can disappear, switched off by a lab, repriced by a vendor, or pulled offline by a Commerce Department directive. The same week Fable appeared and disappeared, Z.ai shipped GLM-5.2 with open weights users can download, keep, and run themselves. Losing Fable hurts. It also makes the case for open, ownable models better than any benchmark could. Quick Fable status update You already know it’s gone, so here’s just where things stand right now, a week after it wen
articles.title_zh: 失去 Fable 為自運行 AI 模型做出了最佳案例
articles.summary_zh: Fable 下線三天後，美國政府來信迫使其離線，這反映出一個更大的課題：存取權不等於所有權。自運行 AI 模型的重要性由此凸顯。

articles.summary: Researchers have demonstrated they can make coffee comparable to conventional espresso using ultrasonic waves. Because the process doesn’t need hot water, it consumes 75 percent less energy.

articles.title: The UK will scan asylum-seekers’ faces for age checks—despite knowing the tech is flawed
articles.summary: Age verification is consuming the Internet . From social media bans in Australia to porn restrictions in half of US states , for many having to prove their age to access websites is becoming an everyday requirement . But one of the key technologies underpinning many of these age checks is about to seep into the offline world—with potentially life-changing consequences for people having their age predicted by AI. Starting next year, the British government is planning to introduce facial age estimation—where AI scans your face and suggests how old you are —to help determine the age of asylum seekers arriving at the United Kingdom’s border. The move is believed to be the first time that a so-called facial age estimation (FAE) system has been used in this way. Many asylum seekers arriving in t
articles.title_zh: 英國將掃描尋求庇護者的臉進行年齡檢查——儘管已知該技術有缺陷
